case_title: SAFECO INSURANCE COMPANY vs. DE CARAVALHO, MARCOS EMANUEL et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAFECO INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT DE CARAVALHO, MARCOS EMANUEL MITCHELL, PEGGY SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-20-1992
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAFECO INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED JUL-23-1992, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DE CARAVALHO, MARCOS EMANUEL
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAFECO INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT DE CARAVALHO, MARCOS EMANUEL
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT MITCHELL, PEGGY

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $114.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAFECO INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT DE CARAVALHO, MARCOS EMANUEL
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-20-1992, CONTINUED TO JAN-12-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS P.O. BOX 13221, OAKLAND CA 94661 FILED BY ATTORNEY WITSER, ROBERT GEORGE
CASE TERMINATED: 08-JAN-93 TERM CODE: J JUDGEMENT FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAFECO INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE CARAVALHO, MARCOS EMANUEL $6,528.86 PRINCIPAL, $171.38 INTEREST, $109.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,809.24
CERTIFY COPY OF JUDGMENT FACT RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT TO DMV FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAFECO INSURANCE COMPANY
ORDER TO PAY JUDGMENT IN INSTALLMENTS GRANTED - 6 - QUIDACHAY.
FIRST APPEARANCE FEE OF DEFT. MARCOS EMANUEL ALVES DE CARAVA LHO DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT DE CARAVALHO, MARCOS EMANUEL
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAFECO INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT DE CARAVALHO, MARCOS EMANUEL
